pi_items.source: setup_task.sh explicitly creates this customer via the Manager.io API.
setup_task.sh creates this invoice with Reference 'INV-BAD-001'.
setup_task.sh creates the invoice with an Amount of 500.
Target value specified in task description and checked by verifier.py ('bad debt').
setup_task.sh and export_result.sh both connect to MANAGER_URL=http://localhost:8080.

privileged_info_summary: The task requires writing off an invoice in Manager.io (accessible at http://localhost:8080). The environment uses synthetic data, including a customer named 'Alfreds Futterkiste' and an invoice referenced 'INV-BAD-001' with an amount of 500.00. The agent is expected to create a new expense account named 'Bad Debts' and allocate the credit note for this amount to it.
